title: Giant Ruined Portals
description: Adds bigger versions of Ruined Portals to the world.
body:
This mod adds much larger variants of the Ruined Portals to the world.

![Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/516b3ecba56ebc40e4a9cb28920e38b8b11c87bc.jpeg)

These giant structures generate naturally across most biomes in the Overworld, just like normal Ruined Portals, but on a much larger scale.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
